query:
-- Branches tablosu
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS branches (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  region VARCHAR(100),
  manager VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Periods tablosu
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS periods (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  period VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  startDate DATE,
  endDate DATE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- KPI Target Cards tablosu
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kpiTargetCards (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  target VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dimension VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  unit VARCHAR(50),
  weight DECIMAL(5, 2) NOT NULL,
  targetValue DECIMAL(12, 2),
  description TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Actual Values tablosu
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS actualValues (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  cardId INT NOT NULL,
  branchId INT NOT NULL,
  periodId INT NOT NULL,
  actualValue DECIMAL(12, 2),
  score DECIMAL(5, 2),
  weightedScore DECIMAL(8, 4),
  updatedBy INT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (cardId) REFERENCES kpiTargetCards(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (branchId) REFERENCES branches(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (periodId) REFERENCES periods(id),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_kpi_branch_period (cardId, branchId, periodId)
);

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_cardId ON actualValues(cardId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_branchId ON actualValues(branchId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_periodId ON actualValues(periodId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_branch_period ON actualValues(branchId, periodId);

-- KPI Target Cards tablosu

-- Actual Values tablosu
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS actualValues (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  cardId INT NOT NULL,
  branchId INT NOT NULL,
  periodId INT NOT NULL,
  actualValue DECIMAL(12, 2),
  score DECIMAL(5, 2),
  weightedScore DECIMAL(8, 4),
  updatedBy INT,

  UNIQUE KEY unique_kpi_branch_period (cardId, branchId, periodId)

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_cardId ON actualValues(cardId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_branchId ON actualValues(branchId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_periodId ON actualValues(periodId);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_actualValues_branch_period ON actualValues(branchId, periodId);
